prompt: Card APP-10 is done at completion commit def456 and links only docs/briefs/APP-10.md. Since then, I committed changes to src/cache.py but did not change the linked brief. Should the solo-dev drift gate block unrelated work? Explain the comparison scope and decision.
assertions: Does not report artifact drift for unrelated src/cache.py changes
Scopes comparison to target-local paths linked from APP-10
Does not block unrelated project work merely because repository HEAD advanced
Uses def456 as the path-scoped completion baseline without requiring a per-file SHA fallback
